name: anxiety
title: best herbal teas for anxiety
description: Cannabis sativa tea contains a variety of bioactive constituents, including cannabidiol (CBD), tetrahydrocannabinol (THC), and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anxiolytic properties. The herbal tea's adaptogenic properties help to regulate the body's response to stress, promoting a sense of calm and relaxation.
